data.name: Bounded Together
data.detailed_description:
Bounded Together is a heartfelt, story-driven visual novel that follows Mc, a reclusive gamer struggling with self-esteem. As he navigates his complex relationships with his spirited roommate Katie and their strict, career-driven landlady Kara, Mc faces challenges that test his emotional limits. Through shared moments and growing connections, he discovers the strength of the bonds that tie them together.

Meet the Characters:

Meet Kara!. Kara is a strict and hardworking landlady who dedicates herself to building a stable and successful future. While she believes her tireless efforts demonstrate care for her tenants, her no-nonsense attitude sometimes creates distance. Beneath her firm exterior, Kara dreams of creating a thriving community and achieving personal growth, striving to balance her ambitions with genuine connections. She values her role deeply, viewing it as a stepping stone to a better future for everyone involved.

Meet MC!. A 24 yrs old is a reserved and introspective adult dropout for almost 4 years who prefers spending time in the digital world rather than dealing with reality. Struggling with low self-esteem, he often isolates himself, finding solace in video games. Despite his loner tendencies, he deeply cares for his friends but rarely expresses it.

Meet Katie!. A 21 Years old, 4th Year College is Mc's friend and roommate, brimming with energy and confidence. Though her cocky attitude and playful teasing can sometimes cause friction, they come from a place of genuine care and admiration. Stubborn yet fiercely loyal, Katie stands by Mc through challenges, always aiming to strengthen their bond.

Contents:

  • Tons of animation scenes.

  • Photo and video gallery.

  • Different endings.

data.short_description: In Bound Together, navigate the lives of Mc, a reserved gamer, Katie, his stubborn yet caring friend, and Kara, their strict, career driven landlady. Explore the complexities of friendship, growing emotional bonds, and the struggles of reconnection that proves love or lust are the ultimate ties.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and up
  • 處理器: intel celeron
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics / Ryzen AMD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 and up
  • 處理器: intel celeron
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics / Ryzen AMD Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.5 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
